## Summary

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Configuration change
- [ ] New model support

## Testing

Describe how you tested these changes:

- [ ] Ran `/consensus-setup` and verified configuration
- [ ] Ran `/code-review` end-to-end
- [ ] Ran `/plan-review` end-to-end
- [ ] Verified quorum enforcement
- [ ] Tested with reduced model count

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the existing code style and patterns
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, CHANGELOG) if needed
- [ ] I have tested the full workflow with my changes
- [ ] My commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
